name: Reflex Cat Treats - Stick Treats, gain Free Poultry Liver & Cat gass (3 Sticks x 5g) 15g
description: Reflex Cat Stick Treats with Poultry Liver & Cat Grass ?are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat. These high-protein, low-fat stick treats promote healthy chewing. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Pack of 3 sticks. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (6% poultry liver), minerals, cat grass (0,1%). NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 33.5 Oil Content (%) - 20 Crude Ash (%) - 10 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) 28 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. For an average cat (4kg) we recommend approximately 1 stick per day. This product does not replace cat's daily food requirement.
